top_signals.title: Paramount’s $110 Billion Warner Bid on Track for EU Approval
top_signals.summary: Paramount Skydance Corp.’s $110 billion takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. is on track for European Union approval, with the firms open to offering concessions to appease concerns over film distribution flagged by the bloc’s competition chief Teresa Ribera.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Michael Saylor should halt Strategy's bitcoin buys, says CryptoQuant
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Netherlands Seizes 800 Servers, Arrests 2 for Aiding Cyberattacks
top_signals.summary: Authorities in the Netherlands have arrested the co-owners of two related Internet hosting companies for operating IT infrastructure used by Russia to carry out cyberattacks, influence operations and disinformation campaigns inside the European Union. The two men were the focus of a 2025 KrebsOnSecurity story about how their hosting companies had assumed control over the technical infrastructure of Stark Industries Solutions, an Internet service provider sanctioned last year by the EU as a frequent staging ground for cyber mischief from Russia's intelligence agencies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: OpenAI unveils first chip as part of Broadcom deal in effort to 'build the full stack'
top_signals.summary: Eight months after announcing a custom chip deal, OpenAI and Broadcom are revealing their first joint project: Jalapeño
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Five Eyes agencies sound alarm about AI’s threat to cybersecurity
top_signals.summary: "The timeline is not years, it is months,” the nations of the Five Eyes intelligence alliance said in a joint alert about the cybersecurity concerns of artificial intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
